target.title: fix(webchat): recover session after stop
target.body:
Fixes #91987.

## Summary
- Persist successful WebChat `chat.abort` requests as terminal `killed` session lifecycle before the RPC responds, including `abortedLastRun: true`, `endedAt`, and `runtimeMs`.
- Reconcile WebChat locally after a successful Stop so the active run id/stream/tool state are cleared even if the terminal chat event is delayed or lost.
- Add regression coverage for the stale `running` session row and local Stop recovery path.

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior addressed: Clicking Stop during an active WebChat run no longer leaves the selected session stuck as `status: "running"` / `abortedLastRun: false`, and the client no longer depends on a later terminal event before it can send again.

- Real environment tested: Local macOS OpenClaw worktree at `/Users/andy/openclaw-91987-webchat-stop-recovery` on branch `codex/91987-webchat-stop-recovery`, with dependencies installed from `pnpm-lock.yaml` via `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`.

- Exact steps or command run after this patch: I ran the issue acceptance commands and the local changed-file gate after the patch:
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts`
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts`
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.test.ts`
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/chat-abort.test.ts`
  - `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts`
  - `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed`

- Evidence after fix: Terminal output captured from the local OpenClaw worktree after this patch:

  ```text
  $ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  86 passed (86)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 2.00s

  $ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  118 passed (118)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 2.81s

  $ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/chat/run-lifecycle.test.ts
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  12 passed (12)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 24.30s

  $ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/chat-abort.test.ts
  Test Files  4 passed (4)
  Tests  108 passed (108)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 23.24s

  $ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts
  Test Files  2 passed (2)
  Tests  54 passed (54)
  [test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 15.96s

  $ OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed
  [check:changed] lanes=core, coreTests
  [check:changed] typecheck core
  [check:changed] typecheck core tests
  [check:changed] lint core changed files
  Import cycle check: 0 runtime value cycle(s).
  runtime-sidecar-loaders: local runtime sidecar loaders look OK.
  ```

- Observed result after fix: The added gateway regression changes a temp session-store row from `running` to `killed` with `abortedLastRun: true` before `chat.abort` replies, and the added WebChat controller regression clears `chatRunId`/`chatStream` after a successful Stop while preserving visible partial assistant text. The copied terminal output above shows those regressions passing in the actual OpenClaw test runner on this branch.

- What was not tested: Browser-driven live model/provider generation was not run in this local pass; the proof uses local OpenClaw terminal output plus production gateway/UI handler coverage for the Stop-then-send recovery path.
target.author: turbotheturtle
